title: Server Launch and Command Registration
interaction_flow: main() → Vars: platform = new Platform(); net = new Net(platform.getNet())
main() → HeadlessApplication: new HeadlessApplication(new ServerLauncher(), crashHandler)
NetServer() → net: handleServer(Connect.class, handler) [fires ConnectionEvent; checks IP ban]
NetServer() → net: handleServer(ConnectPacket.class, handler) [validates uuid/usid/version/mods/whitelist, creates Player, calls sendWorldData(player)]
NetServer() → this: registerCommands() [registers client-side /help, /t, /a, /votekick, /vote commands on clientCommands]
setup() → Core.settings: defaults(bans, admins, shufflemode, globalrules)
setup() → this: registerCommands() [registers 40+ console commands on handler]
setup() [deferred] → handler: handleMessage(s) [for each startup command in args / Config.startCommands]
setup() → Events: run(Trigger.update, autosave + autoPause logic)
setup() → Events: on(ServerLoadEvent, start 'Server Controls' stdin thread)
net.host() → [binds TCP/UDP listeners on configured port]
key_relationships: ServerLauncher instantiates Logic, NetServer, ServerControl and registers them as app listeners
NetServer implements ApplicationListener; holds Administration admins and CommandHandler clientCommands('/')
ServerControl implements ApplicationListener; holds CommandHandler handler('') for console
NetServer constructor calls registerCommands() for in-game player commands (/help /t /a /votekick /vote)
NetServer.init() calls mods.registerClientCommands to allow mods to add player commands
ServerControl.setup() calls registerCommands() for ~40 server-console commands
ServerControl listens for ServerLoadEvent to start stdin scanner thread
ServerControl calls netServer.openServer() (which calls net.host(port)) on 'host' command or autosave load
Administration is owned by NetServer; stores bans, admins, player info; forceSave() scheduled every 60s
console_commands_registered: help, version, exit, stop, host, maps, reloadpatches, reloadmaps, status, mods, mod, js, say, pause, rules, fillitems, playerlimit, config, subnet-ban, name-ban, whitelist, shuffle, nextmap, kick, ban, bans, unban, pardon, admin, admins, players, runwave, loadautosave, load, save, saves, gameover, info, search, gc, yes, dos-ban
client_commands_registered: help, t (team chat), a (admin chat), votekick, vote
packet_handlers_registered: Connect.class → check IP/subnet ban, fire ConnectionEvent
ConnectPacket.class → validate uuid/usid/name/mods/version/whitelist, create Player, assignTeam, sendWorldData, fire PlayerConnect
important_notes: Listener order matters: asyncCore.begin → Logic → NetServer → ServerControl → asyncCore.end. ServerControl.setup() defers startup commands to Core.app.post() so all listeners are init'd first. NetServer.openServer() calls net.host(port) — port from Config.port (default 6567). Administration is instantiated directly in NetServer (not injected). ServerLoadEvent is fired at the very end of ServerLauncher.init(), which triggers the stdin thread start in ServerControl.
